projection_equation_notes: H(t) = H(1990) + 3.4 * integral_{1990}^{t} [T(s) - T0] ds. T0 = -0.5K below 1951-1980 mean. For SSP (1850-1900 baseline): T0_SSP = -0.5 + 0.4 = -0.1K. Slope varies 3.2-3.5 for embedding 2-17yr.

gmsl_product: Church and White 2006 + Chao reservoir correction
projection_equation_notes: H(t) = H(1990) + a*integral_{1990}^{t}[T(s)-T0]ds + b*[T(t)-T(1990)]. b is NEGATIVE: rapid warming adds to rate. For SSP: T0_SSP = -0.41+0.4 = -0.01K relative to 1850-1900.
ODE: dH/dt = [a*(T-T0)+b - H]/tau. Moberg variant: a=1290mm/K tau=208yr b=770mm T0=-0.59K. Historical variant: tau~1190yr a~5030mm. a and tau strongly correlated. Requires ODE integration.
Forcing-based model. Uses separate solar/volcanic/GHG+aerosol forcings. CANNOT use SSP GMST directly; needs forcing timeseries. MCMC on 300yr tide gauge record.
Systematic robustness test of R07/VR09/GMJ10 across dataset combinations. Use to validate recalculations.
Committed SLR under 1.5C/2C targets. Multi-meter commitment over centuries. Could not access full text to verify parameters.
Upper-bound focus. Combined semi-empirical SL model with probabilistic ECS. Must verify from original paper.
Non-parametric. Cannot reproduce from parameters. Common Era GSL +/-8cm pre-industrial. Sensitivity comparison only.
Component-based. Therm expansion: relaxation tau_therm. Glaciers: vol-area-T. GrIS: SMB. AIS separate. Too many params for one row.
Defines TSLS metric. Obs TSLS exceeds AR5/SROCC model TSLS. Diagnostic not projection model.
CMIP6 TSLS: steric 1.5+/-0.2; GrIS 0.8+/-0.2; GIC 2.8+/-0.4 pre-2050 / 0.7+/-0.1 post-2050; AIS models incompatible with obs.
